floor_history.headline: Recon: vT40 floor=4 reproduces on main (canonical C, 178/179); the handoff's active lever (rich-pass permuter workspace + triage + all session-10 tooling) was LOST with the bb2-work-marion worktree an

frontier.hypothesis: Fresh rich-pass permuter campaign with PERM_GENERAL directives placed at the pair-window statements + PERM_RANDOMIZE_TYPE on the check block + PERM_RANDOMIZE_ORDER on the outer do_timeout block, seeded on the s12 z07 novel-masked-4 chassis (u8* tbase with v0-interleaved compute) or w05 (s32 tbaseS chassis), samples a structural-neighborhood NOT explored by s4/s5's vT40-base campaign - the tbase alias births a new function-level qty that changes the local sampler basin.
frontier.mechanism: s5's vT40-base sampler converged in ~10k iterations on the alias-merge attractor family (masked 10-17 seat-trade) and the label-alive +1-insn class (masked 3 but rejected as semantic-divergent). The 9 distinct masked-4 spellings now known (vT40 + s11 u10/w03/w10 + s12 v08/w05/w08/z01/z02/z07) each expose a different qty allocation landscape to permuter mutations. A campaign seeded on z07 or w05 could reach basins invisible to vT40-base sampling.
frontier.next_probe: Permuter modality session (NOT structural). Rebuild offset-0 workspace on w05 or z07 base with PERM_GENERAL directives around the pair-compute statements; --stop-on-zero -j24; watcher auto-triaging sub-200 finds via s2/s4 adiff2.py normalizer. Reject any find reading uninitialized state (vP160 rejection class) or adding net insns.

frontier.hypothesis: The twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 (parked, distance 7, ledger residual = same pair-swap coupling on ip/g3 with cheaper exchange) is the strategic prerequisite: solving its ip/g3 exchange yields a directly transferable exchange lever per fable-blitz 2026-07-07 owner strategy.
frontier.mechanism: Standing frontier item unchanged from s0-s11. Twin's residual is documented as the exchange alone (no region-3 confounding steal). Pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb hold the allocation-equation material (sessions 6f-6h in-place basin correction + final qty_compare equation + s4 half-flip) NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s12.
frontier.next_probe: Route the queue such that cpu_side_move_dir_4 gets its own grind session before another marionation_Exec permuter campaign. Not this function's session (would violate structural modality). Recommend reading pre-merge commits above before dispatching.

frontier.hypothesis: The 3rd-tier residual (region-3 dbr steal @149) may have an unrecognized construct outside current classification - the target's SOURCE shape may have been substantially different from the current outer-flow, using constructs GCC 2.7.2 K&R supports but that don't obviously translate to modern C decomp conventions (e.g. non-K&R declaration order, block reuse, computed-goto substitutes via label-of-var, or unusual switch-vs-if-chain in the check region).
frontier.mechanism: s6/s7 forensics traced the region-3 steal to reorg fill_simple + all-pseudos-callee-saved live-set + no young-code_label on check2's fall-through walk. s7 KILLED the young-label mechanism as unreachable via C construct. But the 140-ordering + 9-topology + 25-s12-forms exhaustion of hand-structural space around vT40 + failure of local sampler to find masked<=3 semantically-valid closer suggests the target's C source predated modern decomp conventions in some structural way not yet enumerated.
frontier.next_probe: Non-structural angles for next non-permuter session: (a) reread ldscript for D_800161C8's neighborhood and check if the debug string layout implies fewer/different args in the original call, (b) reread the ndata catalog for sibling functions that share the do_timeout pattern (marionation_Exec is engine-critical; other engine funcs may hold analogous C-shape hints), (c) dump target-adjacent functions in the marionation module for structural analogies. Kengo was dead-end per slog-kengo-dead-end so not that.

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.

STRATEGY (fable-blitz 2026-07-07): develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb (sessions 6f-6h: in-place basin correction, final qty_compare equation, s4 half-flip) — NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s3; read those commits before another permuter campaign.
